actions_suggested.operation: query filtered by modified_at > last_pull (detect Kevin drag kanban Status)
query tasks with new comments (Kevin feedback sur US/Phase)
actions_suggested.map_to_fos: append commentaires dans .omc/product-state.json pour brief tuile #17

actions_suggested.operation: query plans Status changed (Kevin force archive OR reactive)
actions_suggested.map_to_fos: Update docs/plans/<slug>.md frontmatter status si Kevin a change

actions_suggested.operation: query decisions Status changed (Kevin force Superseded)
actions_suggested.map_to_fos: Update CONTEXT.md table Decisions Status column

diff_detection_rules: Pour chaque entity Notion, comparer modified_at vs last_pull timestamp
Si modified_at > last_pull -> flag comme 'Kevin edited'
Pour DB Tasks Status : si valeur diffère de FOS TodoWrite correspondant -> diff
Pour DB Plans Status : si valeur diffère de frontmatter plan MD -> diff
apply_rules_if_mode_apply: Status Todo/In Progress/Done kanban -> update TodoWrite equivalent
Priority change -> reorder TodoWrite si High
Jamais auto-apply si conflit detecte (FOS MD modifie ET Notion modifie depuis last_push)
conflict_rule: last-write-wins par champ (timestamp modified_at le plus recent). Log .omc/po-conflicts.log avec diff avant/apres. Pas de 3-way merge.
notes: Pattern honnete P-11 : bash ne peut invoquer MCP, Claude execute queries.
Modes --preview / --apply / --interactive guident le comportement de Claude post-lecture manifest.
Apres execution, Claude ecrit resultats .omc/po-results/ + update .omc/po-last-sync.json.
Tuile brief v12 #17 PRODUCT source les donnees depuis .omc/product-state.json.
